summary: Analysis complete. Found 52 endpoints: 22 bridge proxy (most UNKNOWN/PARTIAL - bridge spec undocumented), 28 JSON-RPC (COMPLETE - follows Kodi spec), 2 repo/local. Single biggest gap: /tools/verify_bridge_addon_deploy expects bridge endpoint not in HttpBridgeClient. Biggest ambiguity: bridge addon API contract entirely undocumented - 22 bridge endpoints are speculative without request/response schemas.
next_action: Document bridge addon endpoint contract in CURRENT_STATE.md before implementation
notes: Single most important mismatch: verify_bridge_addon_deploy endpoint references bridge method not implemented in transport
Biggest ambiguity: bridge API endpoints (/version, /status, /runtime/info, /control/capabilities) have no defined schemas
Design issues: GET used for mutating operations (set_addon_enabled, execute_addon)
Recommendation: create bridge_api_spec.md documenting all bridge endpoints with schemas
